title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: tests/test_memory_layers.py (第 1 至 219 行，共 396 行) ---
   1 | """
   2 | 测试三层记忆架构
   3 | 
   4 | 测试 WorkingMemory / EpisodicMemory / LongTermMemory 的基本功能。
   5 | """
   6 | 
   7 | import pytest
   8 | import tempfile
   9 | import shutil
  10 | from pathlib import Path
  11 | 
  12 | from core.memory_layers import WorkingMemory, EpisodicMemory, LongTermMemory
  13 | from core.memory_models import SessionSummary, FileChange, ErrorRecord, ToolUsage
  14 | 
  15 | 
  16 | class TestWorkingMemory:
  17 |     """测试工作记忆"""
  18 | 
  19 |     def test_init(self):
  20 |         """测试初始化"""
  21 |         wm = WorkingMemory(max_size=10)
  22 |         assert len(wm) == 0
  23 |         assert wm.max_size == 10
  24 | 
  25 |     def test_add_message(self):
  26 |         """测试添加消息"""
  27 |         wm = WorkingMemory(max_size=5)
  28 | 
  29 |         msg1 = {"role": "user", "content": "Hello"}
  30 |         result = wm.add(msg1)
  31 | 
  32 |         assert len(wm) == 1
  33 |         assert result is None  # 未满，不淘汰
  34 |         assert wm.get_all() == [msg1]
  35 | 
  36 |     def test_fifo_eviction(self):
  37 |         """测试 FIFO 淘汰"""
  38 |         wm = WorkingMemory(max_size=3)
  39 | 
  40 |         msg1 = {"role": "user", "content": "Message 1"}
  41 |         msg2 = {"role": "user", "content": "Message 2"}
  42 |         msg3 = {"role": "user", "content": "Message 3"}
  43 |         msg4 = {"role": "user", "content": "Message 4"}
  44 | 
  45 |         # 添加 3 条消息
  46 |         wm.add(msg1)
  47 |         wm.add(msg2)
  48 |         wm.add(msg3)
  49 | 
  50 |         assert len(wm) == 3
  51 | 
  52 |         # 添加第 4 条，应该淘汰第 1 条
  53 |         evicted = wm.add(msg4)
  54 | 
  55 |         assert len(wm) == 3
  56 |         assert evicted == msg1
  57 |         assert msg1 not in wm.get_all()
  58 |         assert msg4 in wm.get_all()
  59 | 
  60 |     def test_get_recent(self):
  61 |         """测试获取最近消息"""
  62 |         wm = WorkingMemory(max_size=10)
  63 | 
  64 |         for i in range(5):
  65 |             wm.add({"role": "user", "content": f"Message {i}"})
  66 | 
  67 |         recent = wm.get_recent(3)
  68 |         assert len(recent) == 3
  69 |         assert recent[0]["content"] == "Message 2"
  70 |         assert recent[2]["content"] == "Message 4"
  71 | 
  72 |     def test_clear(self):
  73 |         """测试清空"""
  74 |         wm = WorkingMemory(max_size=10)
  75 | 
  76 |         for i in range(5):
  77 |             wm.add({"role": "user", "content": f"Message {i}"})
  78 | 
  79 |         wm.clear()
  80 |         assert len(wm) == 0
  81 | 
  82 | 
  83 | class TestEpisodicMemory:
  84 |     """测试情景记忆"""
  85 | 
  86 |     def test_init(self):
  87 |         """测试初始化"""
  88 |         em = EpisodicMemory(max_size=10)
  89 |         assert len(em) == 0
  90 |         assert em.max_size == 10
  91 | 
  92 |     def test_add_summary(self):
  93 |         """测试添加摘要"""
  94 |         em = EpisodicMemory(max_size=5)
  95 | 
  96 |         summary = SessionSummary(
  97 |             session_id="test_1",
  98 |             timestamp="2024-01-01T00:00:00",
  99 |             summary_text="Test summary",
 100 |             task_goal="Test task",
 101 |             task_status="completed"
 102 |         )
 103 | 
 104 |         result = em.add(summary)
 105 | 
 106 |         assert len(em) == 1
 107 |         assert result is None
 108 |         assert summary in em.get_all()
 109 | 
 110 |     def test_importance_eviction(self):
 111 |         """测试基于重要性淘汰"""
 112 |         em = EpisodicMemory(max_size=3)
 113 | 
 114 |         # 创建 3 个摘要，重要性不同
 115 |         summary1 = SessionSummary(
 116 |             session_id="test_1",
 117 |             timestamp="2024-01-01T00:00:00",
 118 |             summary_text="Summary 1",
 119 |             task_goal="Task 1",
 120 |             task_status="completed",
 121 |             importance=0.9  # 高重要性
 122 |         )
 123 | 
 124 |         summary2 = Sessio...
